name: TestSuite
description: A collection of related test cases grouped together for organizational, execution, or reporting purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the test suite.

description.description: Description of what the test suite covers and its purpose.

project_id.description: Identifier of the project this suite belongs to.

parent_suite_id.description: Identifier of the parent test suite for nested suite hierarchies.

test_case_ids.description: Ordered list of test case identifiers included in this suite.

tags.description: Labels for filtering and organizing test suites.

created_by.description: Username of the person who created the test suite.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the suite was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the suite was last modified.

total_test_cases.description: Total number of test cases in this suite including nested suites.
